last_planning_summary: Task 138 locked the next adoption-focused roadmap after v0.3.0 release binaries, curl installer verification, and model workspace pack work. CAP-018 records fresh-user install verification, Homebrew as Planned until a published tap/formula is tested, model workspace pack verification, README use-anywhere clarity, announcement kit, first qualitative benchmark case study, optional lightweight static landing page, and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary. The CLI readiness gate reported READY after AMEND-012 was applied, ni relock wrote .ni/plan.lock.json, and ni run compiled .ni/generated/v0.4-adoption-roadmap.prompt.txt at 4000 characters.

recent_decisions.title: v0.4 adoption roadmap is evidence-gated and pre-runtime

recent_risks.title: Adoption roadmap turns distribution or promotion into kernel runtime

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
